_comment: Example WaveCam Control API auth config. Copy to a LOCAL file (never commit real tokens), e.g. /data/projects/wavecam-testbed/auth.json, set WAVECAM_AUTH_FILE=<that path> in the wavecam.service unit, then restart the service. Generate tokens with: python3 -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(32))". Roles: operator (full), viewer (read-only), supervisor (lifecycle + config, no direct PTZ), agent (read-only in v1). With no file present, auth is DISABLED (open) so existing clients keep working.
